final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing avatar/profile picture for a tech/lifestyle content creator focusing on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a globally-appealing, culturally-neutral aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered, works as circular/rounded crop for social media avatars
Subject: must include abstract or symbolic elements representing new energy vehicles, digital tech, and lifestyle goods — exact visual metaphors are yours
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, uncluttered background — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, approachable atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a universally harmonious direction avoiding region-specific color taboos — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must avoid symbols, colors, or imagery that could offend specific cultural/religious groups; must work harmoniously on both Chinese and international social platforms
Avoid: must avoid religious symbols, politically sensitive imagery, region-specific taboo colors, aggressive or divisive visual elements
